topic_angle: 교수가 알면 화낼 GPT Projects 한 학기 통째로 학습시키기
essence_5: 한 학기 강의별 Project 만들기 (10과목 = 10개 Project)
답안 작성·첨삭까지 같은 Project 안에서 끝내기
rationale: 사용자 LOCK으로 interface_capture + #10A37F (ChatGPT 시그니처) 강제. GPT Projects 토픽이 "어디 클릭·어떻게 세팅"이 본질이라 정보형 anchor와 정확히 매칭. 8장 모두 ChatGPT 실제 UI 캡처 톤(faux-UI 한국어 메뉴) + 책상 위 스마트폰/노트북 candid 사진 + 굵은 한글 텍스트 박스가 60~70% 점유하는 nene_weekly 패턴 추종. AI 슬롭 glow·neon·floating UI 차단.

slides.headline: 교수가 알면 화낼 GPT Projects 한 학기 통째 학습시키기
slides.label: GPT 꿀팁 · 필독
slides.prompt:
Slide 1 message: "교수가 알면 화낼 GPT Projects 한 학기 통째 학습시키기" → visual metaphor: 한국 대학생 책상 위 노트북 화면에 ChatGPT Projects 사이드바가 한국어로 펼쳐져 있고, 옆에 강의 PDF·교재가 쌓인 candid 학습 현장 — '한 학기 전체가 GPT 안에 들어간' 시각.

Scene: A Korean university student's home desk shot candidly with a smartphone, late afternoon natural light from a left-side window. Center: an open MacBook displaying a realistic ChatGPT Projects interface in Korean — left sidebar shows a list of project folders with Korean course names like "경영학원론", "경제수학", "마케팅", "통계학", "회계원리" stacked vertically with green folder icons in #10A37F. Main chat area shows the prompt input box at the bottom with placeholder text "메시지를 입력하세요". Beside the laptop on the wooden desk: a small stack of physical lecture PDFs printed and bound, a yellow highlighter, a worn paper notebook with handwritten Korean notes partially visible, a half-empty iced americano in a plastic cup with condensation. Background: blurred dorm room wall with a small bookshelf and a desk lamp turned off (daylight is enough).

medium: smartphone candid · natural daylight (4 PM warm side-light from window) · iPhone 15 default rendering · slight handheld tilt · everyday Korean university dorm desk · NOT studio lighting · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT editorial fashion · NOT movie poster artificiality · NOT floating UI cards outside the laptop screen.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: soft natural daylight from left window at 35° elevation, warm 4500K, no artificial fill, no glow
- camera angle: high three-quarter overhead (45° down) showing desk surface and laptop screen clearly
- composition: rule of thirds — laptop screen occupies right-two-thirds, physical books/notebook on left third, text box overlay covers lower 55%
- mood: anticipatory-practical, 'a student about to break the system'

Color palette: accent #10A37F (ChatGPT green on sidebar folder icons and active state), neutral white #FAFAFA (ChatGPT UI background), wood beige #C8A47C (desk), warm cream #F5F0E8 (paper), deep slate #1A1A2E (text box background for hangul overlay), pure white text.

Display large hangul text "교수가 알면 화낼" with bold sans-serif typography (Pretendard Black weight 900 feeling) inside a deep slate text box covering lower 55% of frame, white text. Below in slightly smaller weight: "GPT Projects 한 학기 통째 학습시키기". Above the laptop in a small white pill-shaped label upper-left: "GPT 꿀팁 · 필독" in black. Hangul rendered with perfect 받침·자모 accuracy.

Texture details: real MacBook aluminum subtle reflection (not CGI gloss), real paper grain on notebook, real condensation on plastic iced coffee cup, fine wood grain on desk. ChatGPT UI inside laptop screen looks like an actual screenshot, not painted.

Composition rules: keep upper-right corner clean ~120px square (handle area). keep bottom 80px clean (dot indicator strip). text box dominant lower 55%, laptop scene as supporting context above. No external account handles like @ainow_kr or 에이나우. No glow effects. No floating UI elements outside the laptop screen. Only legitimate ChatGPT/OpenAI Korean UI on the laptop.

slides.headline: 강의 10과목 = GPT Project 10개로 쪼개서 만들기
slides.subtext: 과목마다 Project 따로 두면 답변 섞일 일 없어요
slides.label: 비결 1 · Project 구조
slides.prompt:
Slide 2 message: "강의 10과목을 GPT Project 10개로 쪼개서 만들기" → visual metaphor: ChatGPT Projects 사이드바에 한국 대학 과목명 10개가 폴더로 나란히 나열된 화면 캡처 — '한 화면 안에 학기 전체가 정리된' 시각.

Scene: A close-up smartphone-candid shot of a 13-inch MacBook screen tilted slightly toward the camera, sitting on a beige fabric tablecloth at a quiet cafe corner. The screen fills 70% of the frame and shows a faux-realistic ChatGPT Korean UI — left sidebar labeled "프로젝트" at top, with exactly 10 project folder rows listed: "경영학원론", "미시경제학", "마케팅원론", "회계원리", "통계학입문", "경영전략", "재무관리", "조직행동론", "국제경영", "경영정보시스템" — each row has a green folder icon (#10A37F), course name in Korean, and a faint count badge like "파일 8". A cursor arrow hovers between two folders. The chat main area on the right shows a fresh empty Project page with title "새 프로젝트" and a hint "파일을 업로드하거나 대화를 시작하세요". Beside the laptop: a black smartphone face-down, a small paper sticky note with handwritten Korean "중간고사 D-14".

medium: smartphone candid · natural daylight (window-side cafe seat, 11 AM cool daylight) · iPhone 15 default rendering · slight handheld angle · everyday Korean cafe corner · NOT studio lighting · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT floating UI outside laptop.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: cool natural daylight from cafe window (right side, 40° elevation), soft fill from white ceiling
- camera angle: low eye-level, 15° tilt suggesting candid 'just snapped a photo' moment
- composition: laptop screen dominates right 70%, text box overlay upper-left 40%, leading line from sticky note to screen
- mood: organized-determined, 'I just set up my whole semester'

Color palette: accent #10A37F (folder icons + active row highlight), white #FFFFFF (ChatGPT UI bg), light gray #ECECF1 (sidebar bg), beige fabric #E8DFD0 (tablecloth), deep slate #1A1A2E (text overlay box), pure white text.

Display large hangul text "강의 10과목 =" upper-left in a white rounded text box with deep slate text, bold Pretendard Black weight. Below in second white box: "GPT Project 10개로 쪼개기". Small upper-left pill label: "비결 1 · Project 구조" in black on white. Hangul rendered with perfect 받침·자모 accuracy.

Texture details: real MacBook screen pixel grain, real fabric weave on tablecloth, real paper texture on sticky note, subtle screen glare from window. ChatGPT UI rendered like an actual screenshot — anti-aliased text, real icon weights.

Composition rules: keep upper-right ~120px clean (handle). keep bottom 80px clean. No glow, no neon, no halation. No floating UI outside the screen. No external handles.

slides.headline: 강의노트·PPT·교재 PDF, Project에 한 번에 올리는 법
slides.subtext: 파일 여러 개여도 GPT가 다 기억하고 있거든요
slides.label: 비결 2 · 자료 업로드
slides.prompt:
Slide 3 message: "강의노트·PPT·교재 PDF를 Project에 한 번에 올리기" → visual metaphor: 드래그앤드롭으로 여러 파일이 ChatGPT Project 파일 업로드 영역에 떨어지는 순간 — '학기 전체 자료가 한 곳으로 빨려 들어가는' 시각.

Scene: A smartphone-candid shot of a laptop screen on a wooden home desk, morning. The screen shows a ChatGPT Project page in Korean — top of the chat area has a file upload zone labeled "파일을 여기로 드래그하세요" with a dashed border. Mid-upload state: 6 file thumbnails partially overlapping in the drop zone — a blue PowerPoint icon labeled "3주차_강의노트.pptx", a red PDF icon labeled "마케팅원론_교재.pdf", another PDF "중간고사범위_요약.pdf", a Word doc "과제2_피드백.docx", a blue PDF "기말_족보.pdf", and a Pages icon "수업필기.pages". Two of them show a small green progress bar at 60% and 85%. The Project sidebar on the left is collapsed but visible. Beside the laptop on the desk: a real physical stack of paper printouts with sticky tabs, a black ballpoint pen.

medium: smartphone candid · natural daylight (morning 9 AM warm side-light through curtain) · iPhone 15 default rendering · handheld slight tilt · everyday Korean student home desk · NOT studio lighting · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT digital painting · NOT floating UI outside screen.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: warm morning daylight from window-left, soft diffused through curtain, 3800K
- camera angle: eye-level facing the laptop screen, slight 10° tilt
- composition: laptop screen center-right occupying 65%, text box upper-third, physical paper stack lower-left corner as anchor
- mood: efficient-relieved, 'one drag and done'

Color palette: accent #10A37F (upload zone active border + progress bars), white #FFFFFF (UI bg), file-type colors (PPT blue #D24726, PDF red #C8102E, Word blue #2B579A — realistic OS icon palette), wood #C8A47C (desk), deep slate #1A1A2E (text overlay box).

Display large hangul text "강의노트·PPT·교재 PDF" upper third in white rounded text box, deep slate text, bold Pretendard Black weight. Below: "Project에 한 번에 올리는 법" with "한 번에" highlighted in #10A37F green underline or background pill. Small upper-left pill label: "비결 2 · 자료 업로드" in black on white. Hangul rendered with perfect 받침·자모 accuracy.

Texture details: real paper sticky tab textures, real pen plastic gloss, real laptop screen glow (subtle, not cinematic), real wood grain. File icons look like actual macOS file icons, not cartoon.

Composition rules: keep upper-right ~120px clean. keep bottom 80px clean. No glow lines from files. No floating UI outside laptop. No external handles. The 'drag' is shown by overlapping position not by motion blur lines.

slides.headline: system prompt에 교수 출제 패턴까지 박아두기
slides.subtext: 이걸 넣으면 GPT가 교수 스타일로 문제 만들어줘요
slides.label: 비결 3 · 출제 패턴 세팅
slides.prompt:
Slide 4 message: "system prompt에 교수 출제 패턴을 박아두기" → visual metaphor: ChatGPT Project '지침(Instructions)' 편집 화면에 한국 교수 출제 스타일이 한국어로 빼곡히 입력된 텍스트 박스 — '교수의 머리를 GPT 안에 옮겨놓은' 시각.

Scene: A smartphone-candid shot looking down at a laptop on a wooden desk in a study room, evening (warm desk lamp turned on but soft). The laptop screen shows a ChatGPT Project settings panel in Korean — modal titled "프로젝트 지침" at the top, with a large text input area filled with realistic Korean instructions like "이 프로젝트는 마케팅원론 과목입니다.\n교수님 출제 스타일:\n- 객관식보다 사례형 서술 문제 선호\n- 4P보다 STP·포지셔닝에서 빈출\n- 시험에 반드시 그래프 해석 1문제 포함\n- 정답 한 줄 + 근거 3줄로 답변". The cursor blinks at the end. Below the text area: a green "저장" button (#10A37F). Right side of the modal shows a small file preview list of uploaded materials. Beside the laptop: a worn paper notebook open showing handwritten Korean notes about 'professor's questioning patterns', a black mug.

medium: smartphone candid · natural daylight + warm desk lamp ambient · iPhone 15 default · low-key handheld · everyday Korean student study room evening · NOT studio · NOT cinematic glow · NOT neon · NOT halation · NOT floating UI.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: warm desk lamp (3000K) as key from upper-right, soft window ambient (cool) as fill from left, balanced not glowing
- camera angle: high three-quarter (40° down) showing screen and notebook together
- composition: laptop screen left-two-thirds, paper notebook right-third (parallel comparison — analog notes vs digital instructions), text box overlay upper 40%
- mood: focused-deliberate, 'I'm encoding the professor'

Color palette: accent #10A37F (save button + cursor accent), white #FFFFFF (modal bg), light gray #ECECF1 (input area bg), warm wood #B8956A (desk under warm lamp), paper cream #F5EBD8 (notebook), deep slate #1A1A2E (text overlay box).

Display large hangul text "system prompt에" upper third in white rounded text box, deep slate text, bold Pretendard Black weight. Below: "교수 출제 패턴까지 박아두기" with "박아두기" highlighted in green pill background #10A37F with white text. Small upper-left pill label: "비결 3 · 출제 패턴 세팅" in black on white. Tiny gray sub-CTA bottom-right of text area: "이 슬라이드 캡쳐 추천". Hangul rendered with perfect 받침·자모 accuracy.

Texture details: real paper handwriting ink texture, real mug ceramic glaze, real laptop screen subtle reflection from desk lamp, real wood grain warmed by lamp light.

Composition rules: keep upper-right ~120px clean. keep bottom 80px clean. No glow. No floating UI. No external handles. Only legitimate ChatGPT Korean UI.

slides.headline: 시험 전날 GPT한테 예상 문제 10개 받는 법
slides.subtext: 족보 없어도 이 Project면 백지 방어 가능하더라고요
slides.label: 비결 4 · 예상 문제
slides.prompt:
Slide 5 message: "시험 전날 GPT한테 예상 문제 10개 받기" → visual metaphor: ChatGPT 채팅창에 한국 학생이 '예상 문제 10개 출제해줘'라고 묻고, GPT가 1번부터 10번까지 한국어 시험문제를 줄줄이 출력하는 화면 — '교수보다 먼저 시험지를 본' 시각.

Scene: A smartphone-candid shot from above of a laptop on a bed (Korean dorm room, late night). The screen fills 75% of frame showing ChatGPT in Korean. User message bubble (top, on right side, light gray): "마케팅원론 중간고사 예상문제 10개 만들어줘. 교수 스타일대로." Below, GPT response (left side, white bg) lists numbered questions visibly: "1. STP 전략에서 포지셔닝 맵을 그릴 때 고려해야 할 두 축의 선정 기준을 설명하시오.\n2. 4P 중 Promotion 믹스가 B2B와 B2C에서 어떻게 달라지는지 사례와 함께 서술하시오.\n3. 시장세분화의 4가지 변수를 한국 화장품 시장 사례에 적용하시오.\n4. ...". Numbers 1~6 fully visible, 7~10 partially visible at the bottom edge of the chat area. The ChatGPT regenerate button visible. Beside the laptop on the bed: a half-empty plastic water bottle, a pair of glasses, a charging cable.

medium: smartphone candid · dim warm room light (night 11 PM, single warm ceiling light) + laptop screen glow as secondary key · iPhone 15 default · slight low-angle handheld · everyday Korean dorm room bed · NOT studio · NOT cinematic neon · NOT halation · NOT digital painting · NOT floating UI outside screen.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: warm dim room ambient 2800K (ceiling) + neutral laptop screen as main illumination on the bedsheet, no rim glow
- camera angle: high overhead 60° down looking at the laptop on rumpled white bedsheet
- composition: laptop screen center-frame, bed sheet wrinkles as leading texture, text box overlay upper-left 40%
- mood: late-night intensity, 'the night before exam, but I'm calm'

Color palette: accent #10A37F (GPT logo + answer indicator), white #FFFFFF (chat bg), light gray #ECECF1 (user message bubble), bedsheet white-cream #F0EAE0, deep slate #1A1A2E (text overlay), warm shadow #2D2520.

Display large hangul text "시험 전날 GPT한테" upper-left in deep slate text box with white text, bold Pretendard Black weight. Below: "예상 문제 10개 받기" with "10개" highlighted in green pill #10A37F. Small upper-left pill label above main text: "비결 4 · 예상 문제" in black on white. Hangul rendered with perfect 받침·자모 accuracy.

Texture details: real bedsheet wrinkle softness, real plastic water bottle reflection, real laptop screen casting subtle light on sheet, real glasses lens. ChatGPT chat bubbles look like actual screenshot, not painted.

Composition rules: keep upper-right ~120px clean. keep bottom 80px clean. No neon glow. No floating UI outside screen. No external handles.

slides.headline: 답안 쓰고 첨삭까지 같은 Project 안에서 끝내기
slides.subtext: 창 바꿀 필요 없이 GPT가 교수 시각으로 피드백 줘요
slides.label: 비결 5 · 답안 첨삭
slides.prompt:
Slide 6 message: "답안 쓰고 첨삭까지 같은 Project 안에서 끝내기" → visual metaphor: ChatGPT 채팅창에 학생이 직접 쓴 한국어 답안 + GPT의 빨간 첨삭 코멘트가 인라인으로 달린 화면 — '교수 첨삭이 GPT 안으로 옮겨온' 시각.

Scene: A smartphone-candid shot of a laptop screen on a small cafe table, afternoon. Screen fills 70% showing ChatGPT in Korean. User message (top right, light gray bubble): "내가 쓴 답안이야. 교수 시각으로 첨삭해줘." followed by a Korean essay-style answer block of about 4 lines: "STP 전략에서 포지셔닝은 소비자 인식 속 위치 선정이며, 한국 화장품 시장의 경우 가격-기능 축으로 분석 가능하다...". Below it, GPT response (white bg) shows the same answer with red strikethrough on weak phrases and green inline suggestions in brackets: "포지셔닝은 소비자 인식 속 위치 선정 [→ 경쟁 브랜드 대비 차별화된 인식 위치]". A small feedback summary box at the bottom: "교수님 시각 평가: 7/10 - 사례 부족, 그래프 누락". The Project sidebar shows the active project highlighted in #10A37F. Beside the laptop: a small ceramic latte cup, a printed paper draft with handwritten red pen marks.

medium: smartphone candid · natural cafe daylight (2 PM, window-side seat, warm 4200K) · iPhone 15 default · slight handheld tilt · everyday Korean cafe table · NOT studio · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT floating UI.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: warm afternoon window-side daylight from right, soft fill from white cafe ceiling, no glow
- camera angle: high three-quarter (40° down) showing screen and printed paper together (analog draft + digital feedback parallel)
- composition: laptop screen left-two-thirds, printed paper with red pen right-third (continuity of feedback metaphor), text box overlay upper 40%
- mood: collaborative-satisfied, 'I'm being coached without office hours'

Color palette: accent #10A37F (active project indicator + feedback green inline), red #DC2626 (strikethrough corrections), white #FFFFFF (UI bg), warm cream paper #F5EBD8, light wood table #C8A47C, deep slate #1A1A2E (text overlay box).

Display large hangul text "답안 쓰고 첨삭까지" upper third in deep slate text box with white text, bold Pretendard Black weight. Below: "같은 Project 안에서 끝내기" with "끝내기" highlighted in green pill #10A37F. Small upper-left pill label: "비결 5 · 답안 첨삭" in black on white. Hangul rendered with perfect 받침·자모 accuracy.

Texture details: real red ballpoint pen ink texture on paper, real ceramic latte cup with milk foam reflection, real laptop subtle screen glow on paper edge, real wood grain. ChatGPT UI looks like screenshot.

Composition rules: keep upper-right ~120px clean. keep bottom 80px clean. No floating UI. No neon glow. No external handles. Only legitimate ChatGPT Korean UI.

slides.headline: 10과목 Project 세팅 후 — 시험 준비 시간 절반으로 줄인 실험 기록
slides.subtext: 매주 GPT가 출제 패턴 기억하니까 누적이 되더라고요
slides.label: 실증 사례 · 12주 기록
slides.prompt:
Slide 7 message: "10과목 Project 세팅 후 시험 준비 시간 절반으로 줄인 12주 실험 기록" → visual metaphor: ChatGPT Project 사이드바 옆에 12주차 누적 사용 통계 화면 + 학생의 실제 손글씨 시간 기록 노트가 나란히 — '주차별 학습 시간이 진짜로 줄어든 증거' 시각.

Scene: A smartphone-candid shot from a slight overhead angle of a laptop on a wooden home desk, late evening warm light. Laptop screen shows a split-view — left half is ChatGPT Projects sidebar listing 10 Korean course folders (same as slide 2). Right half shows a custom-looking project usage panel in Korean with a simple bar chart titled "주차별 시험준비 시간" — 12 vertical bars labeled "1주~12주", with heights visibly decreasing from week 1 (tall, ~8시간) to week 12 (short, ~3.5시간), each bar in #10A37F. Below the chart: a one-line stat "평균 52% 단축". Beside the laptop on the desk: a real paper weekly planner notebook open, showing handwritten Korean entries like "3주차: 시험준비 6h", "7주차: 시험준비 4h", "11주차: 3.5h" — actual handwritten timestamps that match the chart, with a small smiley doodle.

medium: smartphone candid · warm evening desk lamp + window dusk ambient · iPhone 15 default · slight handheld tilt · everyday Korean student home desk · NOT studio · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT digital painting · NOT floating UI outside screen.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: warm desk lamp 3000K key from upper-right, cool dusk ambient from window-left as fill, balanced
- camera angle: high three-quarter 45° down showing laptop screen and paper planner side by side
- composition: laptop screen left-half (digital evidence), paper planner right-half (analog evidence) — parallel symmetry of proof, text box overlay upper-left 35%
- mood: reflective-validated, '12 weeks of receipts'

Color palette: accent #10A37F (chart bars + folder icons), white #FFFFFF (UI bg), light gray #ECECF1 (chart grid), warm wood #B8956A (desk), paper cream #F5EBD8 (planner), deep slate #1A1A2E (text overlay box), subtle warm shadow #2D2520.

Display large hangul text "시험 준비 시간" upper-left in deep slate text box with white text, bold Pretendard Black weight. Below: "절반으로 줄인 12주 기록" with "절반" highlighted in green pill #10A37F. Small upper-left pill label above main text: "실증 사례 · 12주 기록" in black on white. Hangul rendered with perfect 받침·자모 accuracy.

Texture details: real pen ink texture on planner, real wood grain warmed by lamp, real laptop subtle reflection, real paper fiber. Chart inside laptop looks like actual UI rendering not painted. The numbers on screen and the handwritten numbers in planner must match (visual integrity proof).

Composition rules: keep upper-right ~120px clean. keep bottom 80px clean. No glow lines from chart. No floating UI outside screen. No external handles.

slides.headline: 이 세팅법 써보고 싶으면 저장해두고 팔로우해봐
slides.subtext: 댓글 남겨주면 세팅 프롬프트 DM으로 보내드릴게요
slides.label: 팔로우 · DM 증정
slides.prompt:
Slide 8 message: "이 세팅법 써보고 싶으면 저장해두고 팔로우해봐 — 댓글 주면 세팅 프롬프트 DM 보내드림" → visual metaphor: 한국 20대 운영자의 책상 위 candid 손 사진 + Instagram 팔로우 버튼·저장 북마크·DM 아이콘 mockup 3종이 가시적으로 배치된 CTA 화면.

Scene: A smartphone-candid shot from a low overhead angle of a Korean 20-something founder's home workspace, soft late-afternoon natural light. The shot shows: a hand (wrist visible, no face — friendly Korean 20s skin tone) holding a black smartphone vertically near the center-left, phone screen displays a Instagram profile-card mockup in Korean — top bar shows "@fit_ai.founder" handle text, profile circle (gray placeholder, no AI face), bio "AI로 혼자 다 한다 · 23살 예비창업가", and a prominent blue "팔로우" button (#10A37F variant used as accent — but Instagram blue #0095F6 for follow button realism). Below the phone, on the wooden desk: a MacBook with ChatGPT Projects sidebar partially visible (continuity with previous slides), a small printed sticky note with handwritten Korean "댓글 = 프롬프트 DM". 

Three CTA icon mockups overlaid on the right side of the frame as a vertical row of clean white pill cards (NOT floating glow, simple flat cards):
1. Top pill: Instagram bookmark/save icon (outline bookmark shape) + Korean text "저장" in bold black
2. Middle pill: Follow button mockup — blue rounded rect with white text "팔로우" 
3. Bottom pill: DM paper-airplane icon + Korean text "댓글 · DM"

medium: smartphone candid · soft late-afternoon natural daylight (5 PM warm side-light from window) · iPhone 15 default · slight handheld tilt · everyday Korean 20s home workspace · NOT studio · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT digital painting · NOT editorial fashion.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: warm soft natural daylight from window-left at 30° elevation, gentle fill, no glow
- camera angle: high three-quarter (50° down) showing hand, phone screen, laptop edge, and CTA pill row together
- composition: hand+phone left-third, CTA pills vertical right-third, text box overlay upper 35%, leading line from hand to pill row
- mood: warm-inviting, 'come hang out with me'

Color palette: accent #10A37F (border accents + check states), Instagram blue #0095F6 (follow button realism), white #FFFFFF (CTA pills bg), warm beige #E8DFD0 (desk fabric mat), wood #C8A47C (visible desk edge), deep slate #1A1A2E (text overlay box), warm skin tone neutral.

Display large hangul text "이 세팅법 써보고 싶으면" upper third in deep slate text box with white text, bold Pretendard Black weight. Below: "저장해두고 팔로우해봐" with "저장" highlighted in green pill #10A37F with white text. Tiny gray subtext line below: "댓글 남겨주면 세팅 프롬프트 DM으로 보내드려요". Small upper-left pill label: "팔로우 · DM 증정" in black on white. Hangul rendered with perfect 받침·자모 accuracy.

Texture details: real human hand skin texture (Korean 20s, neutral, no rings, no nail polish — natural), real smartphone bezel (iPhone 15 looking real not generic), real wood grain on desk, real paper texture on sticky note. Instagram UI mockup elements look like actual app screenshots — proper Instagram font, proper button radius.

Composition rules: keep upper-right ~120px clean (handle area — wrapper will add @fit_ai.founder there, do not bake handle inside the slide artwork beyond the phone mockup). keep bottom 80px clean (dot indicator). The three CTA pills (저장 · 팔로우 · DM) must all be clearly visible — none hidden. No glow effects on pills. No floating UI outside the cards and phone. No external account handles like @ainow_kr or @nene_weekly. No face shown — only friendly hand.
